Satoshi ------- Start of forwarded message ------- To: gnats-admin@freebsd.org, freebsd-ports@freebsd.org Subject: Re: ports/9625: [update] japanese/Wnn korean/Wnn chinese/Wnn From: TAOKA Satoshi Date: Tue, 26 Jan 1999 23:14:08 +0900 > >Category: ports > >Responsible: freebsd-ports > >Synopsis: [update] japanese/Wnn korean/Wnn chinese/Wnn > >Arrival-Date: Fri Jan 22 19:20:00 PST 1999 The patch of the above PR was not enouph. Wnn4.2 has a problem about a difference of MD5 from DES. This mail contains patches for the problem.
